health_conditions: spinal fluid leak with post-dural puncture headache

benefits.description: Fewer and less severe headaches from post-dural puncture leak complications (24/7 headaches since 2017). Some days with no headache. Does not believe this is placebo.

protocol_notes: Started BPC-157 & TB-500 about 12 weeks ago for shoulder bursitis and frozen shoulder (minimal improvement in those areas). Primary benefit was reduction in chronic post-dural puncture headaches. Still injecting. Concerned headaches may return when peptides are finished.
